overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Edges
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rendered undirected edges (weight in label); drawing only, A* reads wedges.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Goal Node
overridableConfigKeys.description: Id of the target node; A* stops once it is expanded.

overridableConfigKeys.label: G Scores
overridableConfigKeys.description: Best-known cost from start per node; start 0, others 9999 (infinity sentinel). Not rendered.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Nodes
overridableConfigKeys.description: Graph vertices; A* recolours them slate→amber(open)→green(closed), blue=current, red=goal.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick expands one node per step; toggle to start/pause the search.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Start Node
overridableConfigKeys.description: Id of the node A* searches from.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Weighted Edges
overridableConfigKeys.description: Undirected weighted adjacency A* relaxes; each weight exceeds its edge's straight-line length so the heuristic stays admissible.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas width in pixels.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-algorithms / AstargraphOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

edges.description: Rendered undirected edges (weight in label); drawing only, A* reads wedges.

goal.description: Id of the target node; A* stops once it is expanded.

gscore.description: Best-known cost from start per node; start 0, others 9999 (infinity sentinel). Not rendered.

nodes.description: Graph vertices; A* recolours them slate→amber(open)→green(closed), blue=current, red=goal.

running.description: When true the tick expands one node per step; toggle to start/pause the search.

start.description: Id of the node A* searches from.

wedges.description: Undirected weighted adjacency A* relaxes; each weight exceeds its edge's straight-line length so the heuristic stays admissible.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches. Must be one of the events this trait's own transitions already react to.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cells
overridableConfigKeys.description: The 8x8 grid; value 0 = open, 1 = wall, 2 = start, 3 = target.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick expands one open cell per step; toggle to start/pause.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Start Cell
overridableConfigKeys.description: Id (row*cols+col) of the cell A* searches from.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target Col
overridableConfigKeys.description: Col of the goal (denormalized so INIT needn't scan the grid).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target Cell
overridableConfigKeys.description: Id (row*cols+col) of the goal; A* stops when it is expanded.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target Row
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row of the goal (denormalized so INIT needn't scan the grid).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas width in pixels.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches. Must be one of the events this trait's own transitions already react to.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Background Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bars
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial unsorted array; each bar's height is proportional to its value.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Height
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas height in pixels.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Window Size
overridableConfigKeys.description: The fixed number of adjacent bars in each window.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Running
overridableConfigKeys.description: When true the tick slides the window one position; toggle to start/pause the scan.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas width in pixels.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for learning-algorithms / SlidingwindowOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

bars.description: Initial unsorted array; each bar's height is proportional to its value.

k.description: The fixed number of adjacent bars in each window.

running.description: When true the tick slides the window one position; toggle to start/pause the scan.
